title: Motilal Nehru College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Motilal Nehru College Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website Motilal Nehru College. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Motilal Nehru College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Motilal Nehru College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru College Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website Motilal Nehru College. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Motilal Nehru College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Electronic Science / Instrumentation / Physics/ Computer Science (minimum 55%) with NET / M.Phil. / Ph.D.
qualification.details: Postgraduate in Electronic Science / Instrumentation / Physics/ Computer Science (minimum 55%) with NET / M.Phil. / Ph.D.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month (As per ICSSR norms)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Motilal Nehru College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at Motilal Nehru College?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant position is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Electronic Science, Instrumentation, Physics, or Computer Science with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET, M.Phil., or Ph.D.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, as per ICSSR norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant position at Motilal Nehru College.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is MLNC/EVE/2026-27/134.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Motilal Nehru College located?
faq.answer: Motilal Nehru College is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110021.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for this Research Assistant position is contractual.
